tracks.meaning: a loud sound or signal designed to alert or warn someone of danger or an important event
a device that makes a loud sound or displays a warning signal to notify someone at a set time
a sudden feeling of fear, anxiety, or worry triggered by a perceived threat or emergency
an announcement or warning message intended to alert people to a danger or urgent situation
an alert status signifying that military personnel should be prepared for immediate action or deployment
a physiological response involving increased heart rate and heightened awareness triggered by perceived danger
to cause someone to become worried, frightened, or concerned about something
an official warning or notice issued to alert the public or an individual about a legal matter or danger
